pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicit output clearing and verifier.py report location logic
setup_task.sh explicit slicing limit (selected_files = fits_files[:25]) and verifier.py evaluation limits
setup_task.sh injection index matches for exactly 3 distinct frames (indices 5, 13, and 20)

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real WASP-12b observational FITS dataset downloaded from the University of Louisville. The setup_task.sh script limits the data sequence to exactly 25 frames and intentionally injects 3 distinct synthetic degradations into exactly 3 target frames (frame_006.fits with transparency drop, frame_014.fits with wind shake, and frame_021.fits with symmetric defocus blur). The verifier logic strictly enforces that the /home/ga/Desktop/bad_frames.txt output identifies exactly these 3 files.
